etymology.description: Depicts two entangled ropes -> to entangle; to intertwine -> original form of įģū(įģū) (jiÅŦ, 'twist')
etymology.interpretation: The character äļĐ(äļĐ) (jiÅŦ, 'twist') visually represents two ropes entangled together, symbolizing the idea of twisting or intertwining. It is the original form of įģū(įģū) (jiÅŦ, 'twist').
